Title: RPT-01-BE-01 Reporting read models (views/materialized tables)
Description:
Goal: Create fast, consistent reporting sources derived from GL + core modules.

Acceptance criteria:
- Define reporting strategy: SQL views or materialized views for high-traffic reports
- Create at least these views:
  * v_member_savings_balance (member_id, balance)
  * v_member_loan_summary (member_id, outstanding_principal, outstanding_interest, arrears, credit)
  * v_member_penalty_summary (member_id, penalty_outstanding)
- Add migration + indexes as needed

Title: RPT-01-BE-02 Member statement API (Savings + Loans + Penalties + Payments)
Description:
Goal: One unified statement for a member across modules.

Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint: GET /api/v1/reports/members/{memberId}/statement?from=&to=
- Includes sections or unified timeline:
  * savings transactions
  * loan repayments and disbursement events
  * penalty accruals and penalty payments
- Supports pagination (or limits) and sorting by date
- RBAC: member can access self; staff requires REPORTS_READ

Title: RPT-01-BE-03 Member mini-summary API (dashboard widgets)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint: GET /api/v1/reports/me/summary
- Returns: savings balance, active loan status + next due date, arrears, penalty outstanding
- Uses reporting views/read model for performance

Title: RPT-01-BE-04 Loan arrears report (list + aging buckets)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint: GET /api/v1/reports/loans/arrears?bucket=7,30,60,90
- Returns loans in arrears with member, amount overdue, days overdue, bucket
- RBAC: REPORTS_READ; optionally REPORTS_ARREARS_READ

Title: RPT-01-BE-05 Daily collections report (cash + mpesa)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint: GET /api/v1/reports/collections/daily?date=
- Includes totals by channel (CASH/MPESA) and by purpose (Savings/Loan/Penalty/Fee)
- Data source: GL journals + payment records
- RBAC: REPORTS_READ

Title: RPT-01-BE-06 Income report from GL (fees/interest/penalties)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Endpoint: GET /api/v1/reports/income?from=&to=
- Aggregates by income account categories:
  * application fees
  * loan interest income
  * penalty income + penalty interest income
- RBAC: REPORTS_READ

Title: RPT-01-FE-01 Reports hub screen (navigation + permissions)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- /reports landing page with links tiles:
  * Member Statements
  * Loan Arrears
  * Daily Collections
  * Income Report
- Tiles shown/hidden by permissions

Title: RPT-01-FE-02 Member statement UI (staff + member self)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Date range picker
- Timeline/sections showing savings, loans, penalties
- Export/print button (PDF export can be V2; CSV export optional)

Title: RPT-01-FE-03 Arrears report UI (filters + buckets)
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Table with arrears bucket filters
- Search by member number/name
- Link to member loan detail

Title: RPT-01-FE-04 Daily collections UI
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Date picker
- Summary cards (totals by channel/purpose)
- Drilldown list of transactions

Title: RPT-01-FE-05 Income report UI
Description:
Acceptance criteria:
- Date range
- Breakdown by income category
- Totals + simple table
